lines.name: Collateral Damage

explicitModifiers.text: (10-15)% increased Global Physical Damage
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Galvanic Arrow has 25% increased Area of Effect
With at least 40 Dexterity in Radius, Galvanic Arrow deals 50% increased Area Damage

lines.flavourText:
Malachai ran roughshod over every ethical boundary in pursuit of creating the ideal gemling.
For him, there was no doubt that the end would justify the means.

lines.name: Wildfire

implicitModifiers.text: 20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
10% reduced Effect of Shock on you
20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
20% increased Recovery per second from Life Leech

explicitModifiers.text: (10-15)% increased Fire Damage
With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Molten Strike fires 2 additional Projectiles
With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Molten Strike Projectiles Chain on impacting ground
With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Molten Strike has 25% increased Area of Effect
With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Molten Strike Projectiles Chain +1 time
With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Molten Strike fires 50% less Projectiles

lines.flavourText:
News of Kaom's victory in the south spread quickly.
Those in support of the coming rebellion bided their time.
The rest fled like rats from a fire.

lines.name: Hazardous Research

implicitModifiers.text: 20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana

explicitModifiers.text: (10-15)% increased Lightning Damage
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Spark fires 2 additional Projectiles
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Spark fires Projectiles in a circle
(15-20)% reduced Spark Duration

lines.flavourText:
Of the elements at the thaumaturgist's disposal, lightning remained the least understood.
The simple passage of energy from one to another could result in profound power, or rapid death.

lines.name: Primordial Harmony

implicitModifiers.text: 20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
1% of Damage taken gained as Mana over 4 seconds when Hit
(3-6)% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
20% increased Recovery per second from Life Leech
(10-15)% reduced Effect of Shock on you
(10-15)% reduced Effect of Chill on you

explicitModifiers.text: Golem Skills have (20-30)% increased Cooldown Recovery Speed
Golem Skills have (20-30)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
Golems have (10-45)% increased Cooldown Recovery Speed
Summoned Golems have (10-45)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
(16-20)% increased Golem Damage for each Type of Golem you have Summoned
Summoned Golems Regenerate 2% of their Life per second
Primordial

lines.flavourText:
"A stone is not a stone.
It is but one part of a fortress."
- Ezomyte proverb

lines.name: Rapid Expansion

implicitModifiers.text: 5% increased Area of Effect of Aura Skills
20% increased total Recovery per second from Mana Leech
20% increased total Recovery per second from Life Leech

explicitModifiers.text: (4-12)% increased Global Physical Damage

With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Ground Slam has a (25-35)% chance
to grant an Endurance Charge when you Stun an Enemy

With at least 40 Strength in Radius, Ground Slam
has a (20-50)% increased angle

lines.flavourText:
Chitus began to aggressively expand his empire
into neighbouring nations at great human cost. 
But for absolute power, there is no price 
that a Perandus won't pay.

lines.name: Rolling Flames

implicitModifiers.text: 15% reduced Effect of Chill on you
15% reduced Effect of Shock on you
1% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana

explicitModifiers.text: (5-15)% increased Fire Damage
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Fireball Projectiles gain Radius as they travel farther, up to +4 Radius
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Fireball Projectiles gain Area as they travel farther, up to 50% increased Area of Effect
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Fireball cannot ignite
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Projectiles gain radius as they travel farther, up to a maximum of +0.4 metres to radius
With at least 40 Intelligence in Radius, Fireball has +(30-50)% chance to inflict scorch

lines.flavourText:
From north to south the sea of fire swept,
Rolling waves of gorging flame,
Growing taller and hungrier,
With every land they consumed.
